title: CFRA Rates Lucid as 'Strong Sell' Citing 'Extremely Troubling' Cash Burn Rate
text: Lucid's cash burn rate averages between $700 million and $800 million per quarter. More specifically, LCID's free cash flow for Q4 2024 was negative $824.78 million. CFRA has rated Lucid as a Strong Sell, citing the extremely troubling cash burn rate. Based on fiscal year 2025 data, Lucid Group Inc (LCID) had $997.8M in cash against an annual operating cash burn of $2.9B, giving an estimated cash runway of approximately 4 months at the current burn rate. The company's debt situation is also concerning: Lucid Group reported 997.827 Million USD in cash and cash equivalents, and as of the latest reported quarter, Lucid Group has total debt of about 3,196.708 million USD. Lucid burned through $3.8 billion of cash over the last year, and its $2.91 billion of debt exceeds the $997.8 million of cash on its balance sheet, which is a deal breaker because indebted loss-making companies spell trouble.
